title: Cuneiform Tablet #0528: Early Dynastic Magical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a magical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a magical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Magical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records magical matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
